global.description: The ad features a vibrant layout promoting a sale with multiple product panels and clear calls to action.
global.main_message: Promoting a new collection with a sale and rewards.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: Left panel
elements.description: A rectangular panel on the left side featuring three vertical sections, possibly representing products.

elements.label: Middle panel
elements.description: A rectangular panel in the center with three vertical sections, similar to the left panel.

elements.label: Right panel
elements.description: A rectangular panel on the right side with three vertical sections, mirroring the left and middle panels.

elements.label: Bottom left icon
elements.description: A small circular icon located at the bottom left, possibly indicating user-generated content.

elements.label: Bottom middle icon
elements.description: A small circular icon in the middle bottom area, likely representing another user-generated content element.

elements.label: Bottom right icon
elements.description: A small circular icon on the bottom right, similar to the other icons, indicating user-generated content.

elements.label: Main headline
elements.description: A bold text banner at the bottom of the ad, prominently displaying the message about a new collection drop.
elements.text_content: New collection drop Free shipping over $25

elements.label: Sale announcement
elements.description: A large, eye-catching text at the top of the ad announcing a sale, with a bright background.

elements.label: Claim reward
elements.description: A prominent call-to-action text at the bottom, encouraging users to claim a reward.

elements.label: UGC label
elements.description: A small label at the top left corner indicating user-generated content, with a distinct background.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, bright and playful, sale announcement, new collection drop
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, product panels are centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: New collection drop, Free shipping over $25, ThreadMark SALE, $4.99, Claim reward, UGC
